title: phlomis samia subsp. bovei
intro: Phlomis samia subsp. bovei is a plant species within the mint family, known as Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Phlomis samia subsp. bovei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
